docs.title: Welcome to the Drone Project Documentation
docs.text:
This project was initiated in 2025 by students of the Control & Robotics program at Université Claude Bernard Lyon 1.

With no constraints other than time, our goal was simple: push the boundaries of what we could build, and experiment hands-on with state-of-the-art techniques and algorithms developed for autonomous drones.

This documentation walks you through the full journey — where we started, what we built, the problems we solved, and the ones we didn't. And for everything time didn't allow us to finish, you'll find the perspectives and directions we hoped to explore.

To whoever picks this up next — the project is yours now. Build further.
